channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Is Binyamin Netanyahu facing his last stand?
item.description: The legacy of October 7th and the wars that followed will loom over the campaign

item.title: AI super-apps are remaking China’s internet
Russia is starting to lose ground in Ukraine
item.description: Our tracker suggests it has suffered its first sustained net loss since October 2023

item.title: India’s loudest political fight obscures a more urgent one
item.description: The country’s collapsing cities could benefit from plans to redraw the electoral map

item.title: Family Business: Dynastic Politics in the Philippines
item.description: Pressure is building for a change.
